description: A grouped bar chart comparing welfare-program use across three household categories, with a legend labeling blue as 'U.S.-Born-Headed Households', orange as 'Legal Immigrant Households' and purple as 'Illegal-Headed Households'. Categories along the bottom are 'Any Welfare', 'Cash', 'Food', 'Medicaid' and 'Housing', each with percentage labels (for example, Any Welfare shows 39, 52 and 59 percent). A 'CIS.ORG' logo is at lower left.
notable_text: U.S.-Born-Headed Households; Legal Immigrant Households; Illegal-Headed Households; Any Welfare; Cash; Food; Medicaid; Housing; CIS.ORG
